creator: samm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry, i dont see any reason why i need to move all-the-stuff to the 
"wwwroot" directory.
wwwroot is a sample directory from the awstats tar ball, and i dont 
think that we need to depend on this name.
Try to explain more detail report. Currently i  cant reproduce any problems.

-- 
Best regards,
Alex Samorukov, SAMM1-RIPE
Zend Certified PHP Engineer
